text: I don't want to decide so much any more. we spend so much time on admin... the joy gets lost. 1.) always make a prototype that is not live. make the decisions based on data. 2.) make multiple versions if bri missed a key data point. 3.) sand box anything that might be dangerous. 4.) learn what can go live asap. you are the cpt. you learn bri style. >>> you need to prepare for output as "non brian" to go withour always rules: navigation must be consistent and clean for user. caveat: if brian is using for dev...it can be anything that works for brian.
